OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Roy Borrone is present.
Attorney David Wasserman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Matthew Boyd is present.
Attorney Elisabeth Heels specially appearing for Kimberley Shindel representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Karen Kwong, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of FEB 2, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
